title: Ecobank Completes Early Repayment of Tendered US$300m Eurobond Notes - FinancialEDGE
description: Ecobank Nigeria Limited has fully repaid bondholders who validly tendered their notes ahead of the February 2026 maturity date. The bank announced the successful completion of its tender offer, under which it prepaid approximately US$245 million of its US$300 million Eurobond, representing more than 80 per cent of the total issuance. The transaction relates to
html: Ecobank Nigeria Limited has fully repaid bondholders who validly tendered their notes ahead of the February 2026 maturity date.
